chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-2262 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-9577/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of MA-9578/19 4. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2019. Petitioner in person. = Urgency granted. The perusal of the record reveals that instant constitutional petition is second in its series. The first one was dismissed as withdrawn / not pressed. On being asked under what circumstances, the instant constitutional petition has been brought before this Court again? It was stated by the petitioner that the earlier one was withdrawn on some terms which were to be settled out side of the Court, those are not being settled now, it is why he has brought the instant constitutional petition before this Court again. Fresh petition after dismissal of the earlier one, utmost on same cause of action, could hardly be brought that too without seeking permission to file the same afresh, such omission has made the instant constitutional petition to be incompetent in terms of order 23 R-3 C.P.C, it is dismissed accordingly with no order as to costs, without notice to other side along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa, 2
